An official State of Ohio government website. Here's how you know

The site is secure.
The https:// ensures you're connecting to the official website and any information you provide is encrypted and cannot be seen by anyone else.

The .gov means it's official
Many state and federal websites end in .gov, a domain only used by government entities in the U.S.

 

Our security service has detected suspicious activity, and access to the website has been blocked. If you continue to encounter a problem accessing our website, please contact our office at 1-877-767-6446 or send an email to help@ohiosos.gov. Please include the IP address and reference ID listed below.
If you are attempting to request a ballot for overseas voting, please visit www.fvap.gov/Ohio.
